allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/index.bundle?platform=web&dev=true" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 300; "HTTP " + $r.StatusCode + " | bundle bytes=" + $r.Content.Length } catch { "ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message; if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { $_.ErrorDetails.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1500,$_.ErrorDetails.Message.Length\)\) } })

PowerShell($rv = \(Get-Content node_modules/react/package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).version; "react is $rv"; npm install \("react-dom@" + $rv\) --save-exact --silent 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "react-dom now " + \(Get-Content node_modules/react-dom/package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).version)
